title: SilkSpawners
description: Mod that allows mining Spawners & Trial Spawners with Silk Touch.
body: [](https://modrinth.com/mod/dacl) This mod allows players to mine Spawners and Trial Spawners by using Silk Touch (configurable). When mined the spawners drop and they remember the type of mob that they spawn. For Trial they remember things like the cooldown aswell. The config file has 4 options: - enable-spawner: Enable/disable being able to mine normal spawners. - enable-trial-spawner: Enable/disable being able to mine trial spawners. - require-pickaxe: When enabled, spawners only drop when mined with a pickaxe. - require-silk-touch: When enabled, spawners only drop when mined with silk touch. All options are enabled by default. --- [](https://discord.com/invite/jpFJG8dujR) [](https://ko-fi.com/kasetoatz) [](https://paypal.me/KaasToast) Looking for a fun place to play Minecraft and try out some of my mods? Come hang out on the El Basurero SMP! - **IP:** `play.ebsmp.com` - **Recommended Version:** 26.1.2 (other versions work too!) - **Bedrock Edition:** Supported - **Bonus:** Test out most of my server-side mods live in-game! For more info check the [docs](https://ebsmp.com/)!
